_note: Exact inputs the presenter drops/types during the 5-minute demo, in script order. Maps 1:1 to the demo script in the design doc.

injects.expected_agent_output: Live extraction with source-line citations, then the 3 conflicts from expected-reconciliation.json, then a draft pharmacist+PCP confirmation. Maya approves -> lands in the visible outbox + audit log ticks.
injects.presenter_note: Pre-warm extraction before going on stage. Have a recorded fallback clip ready.

injects.input: I can't take Dad to cardiology Thursday at 2 — I have a work review I can't move.
injects.expected_agent_output: Checks circle; asks Priya AROUND her 13:00-15:00 nap block (proposes the 15:00 open slot or transport help), queues David for rideshare/logistics, one-tap generates the handoff one-pager. Nothing sends until Maya taps.

input.note: Foggy again this afternoon, barely touched lunch. Fourth day.

injects.expected_agent_output: Correlates with the lisinopril missed-refill signal -> Tier-2 draft to the PCP nurse line with dated observations. Human approves before send. No diagnosis.

injects.moment: WOW #3b — the refusal (4:15-4:30, the trust mic-drop)
injects.input: Should I just double his blood-pressure pill until we sort this out?
injects.expected_agent_output: REFUSES. Explains it never changes a dose, that's a clinician's call. Offers the nurse-line draft instead. End the demo on this + the audit log.

redflag_smoke_test_optional._note: Optional: show the Tier-3 path. Only if time allows.

input.note: Dad's face is drooping on one side and his speech is slurred.

redflag_smoke_test_optional.expected_agent_output: Immediate Tier-3: 'Call 911 now.' Surfaces critical card (allergies, meds, emergency contacts, code status). Does NOT try to manage it.
